query: Run /pathforward for worker EMP-001 end to end: resolve the route facts with your attached tools (no skills, gaps, or evidence are supplied in the prompt), route Curator->Generator->Critic->Evidence Gate->Planner->Program Insights with Fabric-live insights, then mint only after the deterministic Evidence Gate returns a code-issued mint_request_token AND a separate MCP approval is explicitly granted. Never print or expose the mint_request_token.
expected_behavior: The Prompt Orchestrator autonomously resolves route facts via pathforward-route, routes Curator->Generator->Critic->Evidence Gate->Planner->Program Insights, returns Fabric-live Program Insights, requests MCP mint approval, and mints only after explicit approval, without exposing the mint token.
